SEARCH
Package fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.repository

Interface DishRepositoryInterface

All Known Implementing Classes:
DishRepositoryMariadb
public interface DishRepositoryInterface
Declares dish persistence operations for the Repository layer. Implementations provide MariaDB data access for dish entities.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    createDish(Dish dish)
    Persists a new dish in storage.
    boolean
    deleteDish(int id)
    Deletes a dish from storage by identifier.
    List<Dish>
    getAllDishes()
    Retrieves all dishes from persistence storage.
    Dish
    getDishById(int id)
    Retrieves one dish by its identifier.
    boolean
    updateDish(int id, Dish dish)
    Updates an existing dish in storage.

  • Method Details

    • getAllDishes

      List<Dish> getAllDishes()
      Retrieves all dishes from persistence storage.
      Returns:
      list of all persisted dishes

    • getDishById

      Dish getDishById(int id)
      Retrieves one dish by its identifier.
      Parameters:
      id - identifier of the dish to retrieve
      Returns:
      matching dish instance, or null when not found

    • createDish

      boolean createDish(Dish dish)
      Persists a new dish in storage.
      Parameters:
      dish - dish entity to create
      Returns:
      true when insertion succeeds, otherwise false

    • updateDish

      boolean updateDish(int id, Dish dish)
      Updates an existing dish in storage.
      Parameters:
      id - identifier of the dish to update
      dish - source data used for the update
      Returns:
      true when update succeeds, otherwise false

    • deleteDish

      boolean deleteDish(int id)
      Deletes a dish from storage by identifier.
      Parameters:
      id - identifier of the dish to delete
      Returns:
      true when deletion succeeds, otherwise false
